title: Uphill tempo intervals
coachNotes: Bumped from 4x2m (55) to 2 series of 3x2m (65), beyond even the original pre-cut 5x2m, since Sat is now a low day: two clear easy/low days sit between this and Sunday's long run instead of one. Amber rule unchanged: if HRV/sleep come in amber Thursday morning, cut back to 4x2m regardless of this note. ITB: zero descent, walk back down or use the lift road.
